recipes.title: No-Dataset Smoke
recipes.user_goal: Confirm the local CLI and Python wrapper can report status without reading data.
recipes.claim_boundary: No dataset execution and no generated-output claim.

recipes.title: Local CSV Certified Result
recipes.user_goal: Run a small local CSV compatibility-import-certified workload.
recipes.command: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom --formats csv --scenario "selective filter" --dataset-profile tiny_smoke --rows 256 --iterations 3 --shardloom-result-sink --skip-shardloom-native --no-markdown --output target\shardloom-csv-certified-smoke.json --regenerate
recipes.expected_output: Benchmark JSON with timing, coverage, result-sink, and certificate fields.
recipes.claim_boundary: Certification lane, not pure query speed.

recipes.title: Local Parquet Certified Result
recipes.user_goal: Run the same certification posture over local Parquet fixture input.
recipes.command: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom --formats parquet --scenario "selective filter" --dataset-profile tiny_smoke --rows 256 --iterations 3 --shardloom-result-sink --skip-shardloom-native --no-markdown --output target\shardloom-parquet-certified-smoke.json --regenerate
recipes.expected_output: Local benchmark artifact with separated compatibility-import timing.
recipes.claim_boundary: Scoped local proof only; no broad file-format or lakehouse claim.

recipes.title: Prepared Vortex Batch Run
recipes.user_goal: Inspect the current prepared/native runtime-development lane.
recipes.command: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom-prepared-vortex --formats csv,jsonl,parquet,arrow-ipc,avro,orc --scenario "filter + projection + limit" --dataset-profile tiny_smoke --rows 1000 --iterations 1 --output target\shardloom-prepared-vortex-smoke.json --regenerate
recipes.expected_output: Prepared Vortex rows separate from compatibility import rows.
recipes.claim_boundary: Prepared/native smoke, not performance or encoded-native proof.

recipes.title: Native Vortex Input
recipes.user_goal: Understand where existing Vortex input fits.
recipes.command: Use prepared/native benchmark rows that explicitly label execution_mode=native_vortex when admitted by the scenario.
recipes.expected_output: Source-backed scan and Native I/O evidence fields.
recipes.blocked_explanation: Native Vortex input is scoped to admitted rows and is not broad runtime support.
recipes.claim_boundary: Native Vortex input is scoped to admitted rows, not broad runtime support.

recipes.title: Source-Free Generated Reference Table
recipes.user_goal: Create a reference table without an input dataset.
recipes.command: $env:PYTHONPATH = "python\src"; python -c "from shardloom import context; ctx=context(repo_root='.'); r=ctx.from_rows([{'id': 1, 'label': 'alpha'}, {'id': 2, 'label': 'beta'}]).write('target/generated-reference.jsonl', allow_overwrite=True); s=ctx.sql('SELECT * FROM generate_series(0, 4)').write('target/generated-sql-series.jsonl', allow_overwrite=True); p=ctx.sql('SELECT value AS id, value + 1 AS next FROM range(0, 4)').write('target/generated-sql-range-projection.jsonl', allow_overwrite=True); print(r.claim_gate_status, s.generated_source_kind, s.generated_source_range_end_inclusive, p.sql_source_free_projection_columns)"
recipes.expected_output: Local JSONL output plus a generated-source/output evidence envelope.
recipes.claim_boundary: Scoped local user-row, literal-table, calendar/date-dimension, range, sequence, SQL VALUES, SQL literal SELECT, SQL generate_series/range, and scoped SQL range-projection JSONL/CSV fixture smokes only; broad SQL/DataFrame runtime, object-store writes, and Foundry generated-output runtime remain gated.

recipes.title: Dirty CSV Cleanup
recipes.user_goal: Inspect local malformed timestamp and dirty CSV fixture handling.
recipes.command: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom --formats csv --scenario "malformed timestamp / dirty CSV" --dataset-profile dirty_csv --rows 1000 --iterations 1 --output target\shardloom-dirty-csv-smoke.json --regenerate
recipes.expected_output: Local fixture evidence and deterministic no-fallback row.
recipes.claim_boundary: Fixture smoke, not production data-quality runtime.

recipes.title: Nested JSON Scan
recipes.user_goal: Inspect a local nested JSON field scan fixture.
recipes.command: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom --formats jsonl --scenario "nested JSON field scan" --dataset-profile nested_json --rows 1000 --iterations 1 --output target\shardloom-nested-json-smoke.json --regenerate
recipes.expected_output: Nested fixture evidence with no-fallback fields.
recipes.claim_boundary: Fixture smoke, not broad JSON query runtime.

recipes.title: CDC Overlay
recipes.user_goal: Inspect deterministic local CDC overlay fixture coverage.
recipes.command: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom --formats csv --scenario "small change over large base" --dataset-profile cdc_delta_overlay --rows 1000 --iterations 1 --output target\shardloom-cdc-overlay-smoke.json --regenerate
recipes.claim_boundary: Fixture smoke, not table transaction, lakehouse, or streaming CDC support.

recipes.title: Output Fanout
recipes.user_goal: Understand local output and planned cross-format fanout.
recipes.blocked_explanation: Cross-format fanout is planned; current output proof is scoped local result-sink evidence.
recipes.claim_boundary: No S3/object-store write or table commit claim.

recipes.title: Object-Store Blocked Diagnostic
recipes.user_goal: Ask whether S3, GCS, or ADLS runtime I/O is available.
recipes.blocked_explanation: Object-store read/write runtime is blocked until credential, provider, byte-range, retry, idempotency, commit, certificate, and no-fallback evidence exists.
recipes.claim_boundary: No object-store runtime or lakehouse claim.

recipes.title: Foundry Dev-Stack Smoke
recipes.user_goal: Inspect the local Foundry-style proof boundary.
recipes.expected_output: Local proof report with Foundry and external compute fields set false.
recipes.claim_boundary: Local Foundry-style proof only; no Foundry production or package claim.

recipes.title: Benchmark Evidence Interpretation
recipes.user_goal: Read benchmark output without overclaiming speed.
recipes.claim_boundary: Benchmark evidence, not a leaderboard, performance claim, or superiority claim.
